title: Executive Order 10930—Abolishing the Government Patents Board and Providing for the Performance of its Functions

flags.justification: A standard agency-termination and functional-transfer action to an existing department.
A clear, specific transfer with defined provisions for disposition of property, personnel, records, and funds.
An agency-termination and transfer action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A termination action, not a temporary-authority grant.
Sec. 4 explicitly preserves existing determinations and rules until modified by proper authority, a protective continuity provision.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A routine agency-termination and functional-consolidation action.
A clean, single-recipient transfer to Commerce.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
